title: CleanSpark Exceeds 2024 Year-End Guidance and Accelerates 2025 Guidance
text: CleanSpark announced it exceeded 2024 year-end guidance of 37 EH/s, achieving 37.5 EH/s, and accelerated guidance for 2025. The company's operational execution exceeded analyst expectations and internal targets, demonstrating strong management of mining expansion initiatives. The acceleration of 2025 guidance reflects confidence in hashrate growth trajectory and new facility integration timelines. CleanSpark management highlighted progress on the $650 million convertible bond offering closed in December 2024, which fully funds the expansion to 50 EH/s with timing accelerated to H1 2025. The guidance acceleration signals management confidence in execution and provides tailwinds for analyst sentiment.
